repositories.prompt_note: Use the ClawHub source tree and current main branch. Review every issue and PR with the same evidence standard. Propose auto-close for issues and pull requests that are certainly implemented on main; for pull requests only, also allow age-gated mostly implemented on main. Keep everything else open.

Use the ClawSweeper source tree and current main branch. Review bot automation, workflow, and documentation changes conservatively. Propose auto-close for issues and pull requests that are certainly implemented on main; for pull requests only, also allow age-gated mostly implemented on main. Keep everything else open for maintainer triage.

Use the fs-safe source tree and current main branch. Review filesystem-safety, path-handling, and package changes conservatively. Propose auto-close for issues and pull requests that are certainly implemented on main; for pull requests only, also allow age-gated mostly implemented on main. Keep everything else open for maintainer triage.

Use the spark-dgx source tree and current main branch. This is a SPARK swarm operations repo (shell lanes, LiteLLM gate IaC, markdown roadmaps). Review conservatively for correctness, secret hygiene, and shell-safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the x-api source tree and current default branch. This is a saari-co swarm service repo (Cloudflare Worker / D1 state API and related lanes). Review conservatively for correctness, secret hygiene, and shell/JS safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the smokyworker_setup source tree and current default branch. This is a SmokySwarm worker bootstrap and setup repo. Review conservatively for bootstrap safety, host routing, secret hygiene, idempotence, and shell-safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the SwarmDash source tree and current default branch. This is the SmokySwarm dashboard and operator visibility repo. Review conservatively for fleet-state correctness, UI/API contract drift, secret hygiene, and deploy safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the SwarmLease source tree and current default branch. This is the SmokySwarm lease and resource facade repo. Review conservatively for lease ownership, resource lifecycle safety, idempotence, secret hygiene, and API contract drift. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the pixel-fold source tree and current default branch. This is a saari-co swarm dashboard/device-app repo. Review conservatively for correctness, secret hygiene, and safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the StellarAI source tree and current default branch. This is a saari-co swarm service repo. Review conservatively for correctness, secret hygiene, and safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the aicommerce source tree and current default branch. This is a saari-co swarm commerce-backend repo (products, payments, orders). Review conservatively for correctness, secret hygiene, money/precision handling, and safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the clawsweeper source tree and current default branch. This is the ClawSweeper review-automation engine itself (TypeScript/tsgo plan+review pipeline, repair workers, dashboard, and the target-repository config). Review conservatively for correctness, secret hygiene, and safety, and note that changes here can affect the very pipeline reviewing this PR. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

Use the smokyworks source tree and current main branch. This is the Smoky Works product site (EmDash CMS-first, Astro + Cloudflare Workers, dinkus Portable Text block renderers). Review conservatively for correctness, content-render fallback safety (missing or unpublished content must 404, never render a blank or shadow page), secret hygiene, and shell-safety. Do not auto-close issues or pull requests; this host-side subscription pilot is proposal-only.

generic_fallbacks.prompt_note: Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository is using the generic OpenClaw onboarding profile, so keep review conservative: issues and pull requests may be auto-closed only when the exact change is certainly already implemented on the default branch; pull requests may also be age-gated mostly implemented there.

Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository is using the generic personal-repository onboarding profile, so review conservatively and do not auto-close issues or pull requests unless a repository-specific profile later enables that policy.
